title: Project 39A of NLU Delhi invites applications for internship programme
description: Project 39A at National Law University Delhi (NLUD) is accepting applications for its internship programme on a rolling basis till the month of October 2026. The last date to apply is June 15, 2026.ABOUT PROJECT 39AProject 39A, a premier centre at NLU Delhi, has been at the forefront of advancing the values of equal justice and equal opportunity, inspired by Article 39-A of the Constitution of India. Through rigorous empirical research, it engages with key issues in the criminal justice system,
